goal: Remove binary visual snapshot while keeping chat UI styling improvements validated via deterministic layout tokens.
constraints: Follow repository guardrails defined in AGENTS.md
Use pnpm scripts for quality checks
Avoid introducing binary artifacts into the repository
Keep working tree clean before completion

acceptance.then: visual regression coverage relies on text-based snapshots and passes without binary assets

acceptance.when: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test run

input.description: Replace screenshot assertion with deterministic style snapshot logic

steps.expect: Playwright test captures design tokens in text form

input.description: Remove binary snapshot and add textual JSON snapshot

steps.expect: Snapshot directory contains only text files

input.command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:ui

risks: Computed style values may vary across environments causing flaky snapshots
Removing binary snapshot could reduce coverage if not capturing enough tokens
rollback: Revert to previous commit if new snapshot approach fails
Adjust computed style selection to minimize variability
